headline: Apple (AAPL) Teams Up With Intel To Build Chips In The United States
summary: Apple and Intel are partnering to design and manufacture chips in the United States, with direct backing from the U.S. administration. The move is intended to address memory supply disruptions and price pressure linked to AI driven chip demand. The partnership aligns with broader government efforts to build domestic semiconductor capacity and reduce reliance on overseas manufacturing. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:AAPL, this shift comes as Apple trades at $298.01 per share, with the stock...

headline: India's Tata Electronics hit by cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
summary: Tata Electronics said on Monday it had detected a recent "cybersecurity incident", after researchers said World Leaks posted purported component design and specification papers of Apple and Tesla, both customers of the Indian group.  Apple was investigating the breach ​and a "full analysis was going on", a source familiar with the matter said, adding that Tata had received a ransom demand related to the incident.  Apple did not respond to requests for comment.

content.title: India's Tata Electronics hit by cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
content.summary: Tata Electronics said on Monday it had detected a recent "cybersecurity incident", after researchers said World Leaks posted purported component design and specification papers of Apple and Tesla, both customers of the Indian group.  Apple was investigating the breach ​and a "full analysis was going on", a source familiar with the matter said, adding that Tata had received a ransom demand related to the incident.  Apple did not respond to requests for comment.

thumbnail.caption: A computer lit by a displayed cyber code is seen in this illustration picture

headline: Mag 7 Stocks Are Down. Long-Term Investors Should Buy the Dip.
summary: Each of these stocks—  Nvidia Tesla Apple Meta Platforms Alphabet Amazon.com  and  Microsoft  —is down, but many indicators show that dip-buyers should come in soon.  Nvidia  has underperformed the rest of the chip universe since mid May, partly because other chip makers are selling general purpose artificial intelligence chips for companies’ data centers, threatening Nvidia’s market share.  Apple is trying to prove it can maintain respectable sales growth (maybe its new AI strategy can help).
